prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-AONGHW33FNRCBF-LG-BLCK Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Ninja Grappling Hook with 33 Feet Nylon Rope Compact Black Finish Description: Secure rope or dredge for submerged objects with the ASR Outdoor Ninja Grappling Hook.

This hook comes with two 8" spikes and 33 feet of nylon rope so you'll be able to reach far away objects with ease. The hook itself is 9.5", and is constructed of heavy duty black stainless steel. There is also a loop on on the hook to attach the nylon cord.

Grappling hooks are useful for throwing, dropping, sinking, projecting or fastening directly by hand to where one of the hooks may catch and hold. Compact and easy to carry, this is a useful item for outdoor adventures. Search Terms: grappling hook with rope climbing ninja black light that pulls you up paracord hooks for adults gifts dad accessories military gear guys gift Features: - ASR Outdoor Ninja Grappling Hook - Black Finish Stainless Steel - Overall Length: 9.5" - Length of Spikes: 8" - 33 Feet of Nylon Cord - Compact | Comes with Hook for Rope === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Ninja Grappling Hook 33ft Rope Black

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Stainless Steel, 95In Hook With 8In Spikes, 33 Feet Nylon Rope, Compact And Portable

openai.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Stainless Steel, Two 8" Spikes, 33 Feet Nylon Cord, Rope Attachment Loop, Compact Carry, Outdoor Retrieval Tool
